span.p:
normgate (rank 5)
normalized-view / provenance
catches evasions the base markers miss

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
ctxmmu (rank 10)
base markers + secret regex
(≈100% evadable ALONE: 24/24 obfuscated walked through)

span.p:
roadmap drivers plug in as new ranks (no edit to ctxmmu):
NFKC/UTS#39 canonicalize · broken-token pre-scan ·
capability-IFC (CaMeL / FIDES) · source-taint stamp · learned detectors

div.style: color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
⚡ catch-more = an independent plug-in driver; the fold is monotone.
(recall's re-screen folds the BASE gate today — folding the chain to inherit normgate is the pending one-line integration.)
